svg.title: CAST Request Event Flow
svg.desc: Animated Cast request flow: clinician walks to workstation, sends status-request to worklist and reporting, loads CT and report template, closes the template, adds measurements on the image, then celebrates.
svg.text: status-request: one poll loads worklist and report.

g.text: The user is reviewing a report on his tablet
and walks over to the workstation to view the images.
Step 1: Image Display launches with no URL parameters
Viewer starts empty — worklist and report load via one status-request
Step 4: CT images and report template open side by side
Both arrive from the collated status-response.
Step 5: Report template closes — add measurements on the image
Right-click the slice to pick a measurement field.
Step 6: Measurements in place — ready to complete the report
The clinician has everything needed to finish.
